name: Pesto Cheese Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve a couple of basil leaves for garnish.
2. Combine basil, parmesan, garlic, and pine nuts in a food processor and pulse to mix well.
3. With the machine running, add olive oil in a thin-stream and process until thickened. Set aside.
4. Combine cream cheese and camembert or brie in a food processor and process until well blended thoroughly.
5. Fold in whipped cream.
6. Spread one-fourth of the cheese mixture into a plastic wrap-lined gelatin mold.
7. Top with one-third pesto mixture.
8. Repeat adding cheese, then pesto mixtures.
9. Cover and chill for 4-24 hours.
10. Unmold onto a serving platter.
11. Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature, with assorted savory crackers, breads, and/or toasts on the side.
